title: Family = 4 people = 4 sides = square
content:
Family = 4 people = 4 sides = square
The script should have internal structural symmetry

Each character’s death is freeze framed then uploaded.


Trash Compactor
Temperature Control/ Heat exhaustion
Drowning
Medication Overdose

Terrorist Organization of woman, Dark Web, Extremists — wife is extremized and offers her family to the message - VUN PUS

Family has a child growing in a tank

Everyone’s dreams are thoughts are stored on hard drives, they consult with an automated therapist

Violent environment

The house is slowly cooking, slowly running out of oxygen, which is what inclines them to play along at least in the beginning

GRE is gagged in the standup shower, ROK is coaxed into the shower to try and save him - they drown. This is a consequence of SUS deciding to have the org kill her instructor?

I knew you wouldn’t care that I wanted a divorce
You didn’t have to kill me for not caring.
